name: anthropics/skills
description: Official Anthropic repository of Agent Skills. Contains example skills for Creative & Design, Development & Technical, Enterprise & Communication, and Document Skills (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx). Source-available and actively used in production.
installation_steps: Clone the repository: git clone https://github.com/anthropics/skills.git
Copy desired skill folders to your project's .claude/skills/ directory
Skills are automatically available in Claude.ai paid plans

name: anthropics/claude-code
description: Official Claude Code repository containing plugins, hook examples, and extension infrastructure. Includes official plugins for frontend-design, plugin-dev, and skill-development with SKILL.md templates.

name: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
description: Official Anthropic-managed directory of high-quality Claude Code Plugins. Automatically available when you start Claude Code.
installation_steps: Automatically available when using Claude Code
Can also register as a marketplace source within Claude Code

name: anthropics/claude-code-security-review
description: AI-powered security review GitHub Action using Claude to analyze code changes for security vulnerabilities. Uses deep semantic understanding for diff-aware scanning with advanced filtering to reduce noise.
installation_steps: Add the GitHub Action to your repository's workflow YAML

name: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
description: +192 Claude Code skills and agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents. Covers engineering, marketing, product, compliance, and C-level advisory domains.
installation_steps: Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and others

name: alirezarezvani/claude-code-skill-factory
description: Claude Code Skill Factory - A powerful open-source toolkit for building and deploying production-ready Claude Skills, Code Agents, custom Slash Commands, and LLM Prompts at scale. Generate structured skill templates and automate workflow integration.
installation_steps: Follow the skill factory setup instructions
Use templates to generate new skills
